description: capture a desktop/app/window/region screenshot to a PNG file (read-only)
rules: read-only — writes exactly one PNG (screenshot.png) under record_store
SHOT_MODE picks the save mode (temp or default); the porter always pins the file under record_store
SHOT_APP (macOS) captures matching windows; SHOT_REGION captures an x,y,w,h pixel box
offline / no display: the core runs in CODEX_SCREENSHOT_TEST_MODE and emits a deterministic fixture PNG
usage: Set SHOT_MODE (temp|default), optionally SHOT_APP and SHOT_REGION. Output: screenshot.png.
limitation: A live capture needs a real display (macOS Screen Recording permission for app/window capture; scrot/gnome-screenshot/import on Linux). Windows is unsupported by this porter. With none present it degrades to a fixture PNG.
